mapper.insert: INSERT INTO novel_seed (seed_id, novel_id, title, genre, core_conflict, world_setting, protagonist_setting, target_word_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{seedId}, #{novelId}, #{title}, #{genre}, #{coreConflict}, #{worldSetting}, #{protagonistSetting}, #{targetWordCount}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE novel_seed SET title = #{title}, genre = #{genre}, core_conflict = #{coreConflict}, world_setting = #{worldSetting}, protagonist_setting = #{protagonistSetting}, target_word_count = #{targetWordCount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE seed_id = #{seedId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, seed_id, novel_id, title, genre, core_conflict, world_setting, protagonist_setting, target_word_count, create_time, update_time FROM novel_seed WHERE seed_id = #{seedId}

SELECT id, seed_id, novel_id, title, genre, core_conflict, world_setting, protagonist_setting, target_word_count, create_time, update_time FROM novel_seed WHERE novel_id = #{novelId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
